basics.name: Emily Zhao
basics.summary: Striving to create a vivid, curious, and impactful life. Interested in Algorithm Development, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, & all things Software!

work.name: Cardiac Rhythm Management, Medtronic
work.summary:
Designed Python-based Universal Core Longevity Estimator algorithm for next-gen implantable cardiac devices, reducing development time by 12 months, standardizing cross-device performance, and reducing field error occurrences. 
Automated data analysis and visualization of device current testing and documentation, significantly improving process efficiency. Troubleshoot software for automated testing scripts to improve hardware characterization processes.

work.name: Cardiac Rhythm Management, Medtronic
work.summary: Conducted bench testing and data analysis of Bluetooth field data from Medtronic’s Patient Programmer to profile the noise interference in operating rooms, developed an algorithm to simulate and predict Bluetooth data throughput with Wi-Fi coexistence, to help redefine signal transmission protocol for greater reliability.

work.name: Summer Orchestra Program, Mounds View Public Schools
work.summary: Led private lessons, sectionals, and group lessons for 4th-6th grade students learning violin, viola, cello, and bass.
highlights: Discovered a love for teaching here!

involvement.summary: Coordinate a STEM hackathon for 100+ high school students, teaching Python & AI, data visualization, game development, and cybersecurity workshops, while connecting participants with professionals on careers in tech.
Lead the redesign and strategic expansion of Duke Conversations, advancing our mission to connect faculty and students through weekly intimate dinner discussions with administration and professors.
Lead organizer for the New York City branch of the People's Climate March, the largest climate march in history.
highlights: Awarded 'Climate Hero' award by Greenpeace for my efforts organizing the march.
Men of the year 2014 by Time magazine
